disagreement.response_b: Westbrook College was founded in 1833.

disagreement.question: In what year was University of Shanghai founded?
disagreement.response_a: I don't know the exact year the University of Shanghai was founded. There are several universities in Shanghai, and without more specific information, I can't determine which one you are referring to or when it was established.
disagreement.response_b:
The University of Shanghai for Science and Technology (USST) was founded in 1906 as the Shanghai Medical College. However, if you are referring to the historical institution known as the "University of Shanghai," it may be conflated with the former St. John's University, which was established in 1879.
